# DocuForge

> PDF generation API for developers. HTML in, pixel-perfect PDF out.

## Docs
- [Quickstart](https://getdocuforge.dev/docs/quickstart)
- [HTML to PDF](https://getdocuforge.dev/docs/api-reference/generate)
- [Templates](https://getdocuforge.dev/docs/api-reference/templates)
- [API Reference](https://getdocuforge.dev/docs/api-reference/generate)
- [Full LLM Docs](https://getdocuforge.dev/llms-full.txt)

## SDKs
- TypeScript: `npm install docuforge` ‚Äî `DocuForge` class with `generate()`, `fromTemplate()`, `fromReact()`, `batch()`, `templates.*`
- Python: `pip install docuforge` ‚Äî mirrors TS SDK API, uses httpx + Pydantic v2
- Go: `go get github.com/docuforge/docuforge-go` ‚Äî stdlib net/http, functional options, context-based API
- Ruby: `gem install docuforge` ‚Äî uses Faraday HTTP client, idiomatic Ruby API

## Core Endpoints
- `POST /v1/generate` ‚Äî Generate PDF from HTML, React (JSX/TSX), or template + data. Supports watermarks, headers/footers with `{{pageNumber}}`/`{{totalPages}}`.
- `POST /v1/generate/batch` ‚Äî Async batch generation via job queue. Returns 202 with job IDs.
- `GET /v1/generations/:id` ‚Äî Get generation status and result.
- `GET /v1/generations` ‚Äî List generation history.

## PDF Tools
- `POST /v1/pdf/merge` ‚Äî Merge multiple PDFs (base64 input).
- `POST /v1/pdf/split` ‚Äî Split PDF by page ranges.
- `POST /v1/pdf/info` ‚Äî Get PDF metadata (page count, size, etc.).
- `POST /v1/pdf/sign` ‚Äî Add a visual signature annotation (overlay + metadata). Not a cryptographic digital signature.
- `POST /v1/pdf/pdfa` ‚Äî Convert to PDF/A-1b archival format.
- `POST /v1/pdf/forms/fill` ‚Äî Fill form fields in existing PDF.
- `POST /v1/pdf/forms/add-fields` ‚Äî Add form fields (text, checkbox, dropdown).
- `POST /v1/pdf/forms/list-fields` ‚Äî List form fields in a PDF.

## Templates
- `POST /v1/templates` ‚Äî Create template (Handlebars syntax: `{{variable}}`, `{{#each}}`, `{{#if}}`).
- `GET /v1/templates` ‚Äî List templates.
- `GET /v1/templates/:id` ‚Äî Get template with version info.
- `PUT /v1/templates/:id` ‚Äî Update template (auto-increments version).
- `DELETE /v1/templates/:id` ‚Äî Delete template.
- `GET /v1/templates/:id/versions` ‚Äî List version history.
- `POST /v1/templates/:id/restore` ‚Äî Restore to previous version.

## Template Marketplace
- `GET /v1/marketplace` ‚Äî Browse public community templates.
- `POST /v1/marketplace/:id/clone` ‚Äî Clone a public template to your account.
- `POST /v1/marketplace/:id/publish` ‚Äî Publish your template.
- `GET /v1/starter-templates` ‚Äî 5 pre-built starter templates (no auth required).
- `POST /v1/starter-templates/:slug/clone` ‚Äî Clone a starter template.

## React-to-PDF
Send JSX/TSX directly via `react` field in `/v1/generate`. Server transpiles with esbuild and renders via `renderToStaticMarkup`. Component library `@docuforge/react` provides: Document, Page, Header, Footer, Table, Grid, Watermark, Barcode, Signature, List, Divider, PageNumber.

## QR Codes & Barcodes
Use `{{qr:data}}` and `{{barcode:data}}` placeholders in HTML. Replaced with inline SVGs during rendering.

## AI Template Generation
- `POST /v1/ai/generate-template` ‚Äî AI-powered template generation using Claude. Requires `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY`.

## MCP Server
`@docuforge/mcp-server` for AI agent integration (Claude Desktop, Cursor, Claude Code). Provides 7 tools for generating PDFs, managing templates, and querying usage from AI assistants.

## Usage & Billing
- `GET /v1/usage` ‚Äî Current billing period stats.
- Plans: Free (1K PDFs/mo), Starter $29 (10K), Pro $99 (100K), Enterprise (unlimited).
- Rate limits: Free 10 req/s, Starter/Pro 100 req/s, Enterprise 500 req/s.

## Quick Example
```typescript
import { DocuForge } from 'docuforge';
const df = new DocuForge('df_live_...');
const pdf = await df.generate({
  html: '<h1>Invoice #1234</h1>',
  options: { format: 'A4', margin: '1in' }
});
console.log(pdf.url);
```
